content:
✅ Why This Works:
• Maintains the “day vs. night” dialectic from catharsis threads.
• Engages students with visual storytelling & cinematic narrative techniques.
• Gives them breathing room before research-heavy Weeks 13-15.

5️⃣ Next Steps & Final Adjustments

A. Expanding Alternative Path Labels & Themes

✔ Path names should reflect both positive & negative traits (e.g., “Seat Warmer” vs. “Debate Champion”).
✔ The “Fallen Angel” path should incorporate the symbolism of Lucifer, Prometheus, the Rebel, or the Betrayer.

B. Unlocking Assignments & Grading Adjustments

✔ Paths should allow dropping of two lowest assignments (but must be unlocked).
✔ Mastery Exam Path requires three perfect scores (symbolic Rule of Three).
context: From document: Comprehensive Course Structure and Alternating Schedule (A & B Weeks… — chunk 88 (chunk 88/108)
